channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ukraine conducts drone strikes on Russian oil port and vessels
item.description: Ukraine launched a series of drone attacks across Russian territory on Sunday, targeting the Baltic Sea port of Primorsk and causing a fire, though it was quickly extinguished without any oil spill. U...

item.title: ADC releases 2026 primary election schedule and nomination fees for aspirants
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don officially release im timetable for the 2026 primary elections, together with the fees wey aspirants go pay to contest for different political positions. Acco...

item.title: Nigeria Arranges Repatriation Flights Amid Rising Anti-Migrant Tensions in South Africa
item.description: Amid growing anti-immigrant tensions in South Africa, Nigeria has announced measures to repatriate its citizens. The initiative comes after protests led by groups such as March and March, targeting fo...

item.title: Victoria’s Budget Strain Driven by Rising Health and Interest Costs
item.description: Victoria is facing a constrained fiscal environment, with government spending rising faster than expected and limiting budget flexibility. According to analysis by the independent e61 Institute, total...

item.title: ASR District Collector Reviews Poor Class 10 Performance and Plans Improvement Strategies
item.description: Nishanthi T., the District Collector of Alluri Sitharama Raju (ASR), conducted a detailed review meeting with education department officials to assess the Class 10 results for the district. The result...

item.title: Passenger develops romantic connection with flight attendant during cross-country flight
item.description: A woman who was travelling across the country for a blind date unexpectedly formed a connection with the flight attendant on her plane. The encounter, which began as a routine flight, led to mutual in...

item.title: Mazwi Kubheka Returns After Month-Long Disappearance in Vosloorus
item.description: Mazwi Kubheka, a spaza shop owner from Vosloorus, has returned home after being missing for a month, sparking both relief and lingering questions in the community. Kubheka was last seen on April 2 whi...

item.title: Search underway for two US soldiers missing during African Lion exercises in Morocco
item.description: Two US service members participating in the African Lion joint military exercises have gone missing near Tan Tan in southern Morocco, according to the US Africa Command (Africom) and the Moroccan Roya...

item.title: Veteran Runner Mac Speake Concludes 45-Year London Marathon Streak
item.description: Mac Speake, an 84-year-old retired GP from Suffolk, has run every London Marathon since its inception in 1981, completing a remarkable 45 races. Known as part of the 'Ever Presents', a group of runner...

item.title: Analysis: Market Outlook for AbbVie Following Recent Earnings Performance
item.description: AbbVie recently reported impressive quarterly earnings that significantly surpassed Wall Street expectations, primarily fueled by the strong performance of its diverse immunology portfolio. Despite th...

item.title: Iran Evaluates US Reply to 14-Point Peace Proposal Mediated by Pakistan
item.description: Tehran has stated that it is currently reviewing the United States' response to its 14-point proposal, which was sent through Pakistan, according to Iranian state media. Officially, the Iranian foreig...

item.title: Bag charms trend in 2026 offers affordable ways to personalize handbags
item.description: Handbag charms have emerged as one of the most prominent fashion accessories of 2026, offering a simple and affordable way to personalize everyday bags. According to Global News’ Curator team, these s...

item.title: Peshawar Zalmi eye PSL 11 title after Hardie shines with four wickets
item.description: In a high-stakes PSL 11 final at Lahore’s Gaddafi Stadium, Peshawar Zalmi have put themselves in an excellent position to win the title, needing just 130 runs to lift the trophy. Bowling all-rounder A...

item.title: PREMIUM TIMES Recognises Exceptional Journalists in 2024-2025 Staff Awards
item.description: Nigeria's leading investigative newspaper, PREMIUM TIMES, don organise their fourth and fifth combined annual staff awards to celebrate journalists, editors, and digital strategists wey show hard work...

item.title: Two Minors Allegedly Involved in Jeepney Robbery in Las Piñas
item.description: In Las Piñas City, two minors have been accused of robbing a local jeepney while allegedly threatening the driver and passengers with an ice pick. Authorities are coordinating with the Barangay Counci...

item.title: Teenage boy dies after being struck by falling tree in Stafford as community pays tribute
item.description: A teenage boy has died after being struck by a falling tree in Stafford, prompting an outpouring of grief and tributes from the local community. Emergency services, including paramedics, police, and a...

item.title: AAP and Rebel MPs to Meet President Murmu Amidst Tensions
item.description: Amid the growing rift within the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP), both factions – the official AAP camp and the rebel MPs – are set to meet President Droupadi Murmu on Tuesday. The conflict stems from the ongoi...

item.title: OPEC+ raises oil output limits; UAE departure not discussed
item.description: The Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries and its allies, collectively known as OPEC+, have announced an increase in their oil production quotas. The decision aims to respond to rising glo...

item.title: Nigeria condemns Mali Defence Minister’s death in terrorist attack
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria don condemn the killing of Mali’s Minister of Defence and Veteran Affairs, Sadio Camara. According to the Nigerian Ministry of Foreign Affairs, this wahala na tragic ...

item.title: Sir Alex Ferguson admitted to hospital after feeling unwell prior to Manchester United vs Liverpool match
item.description: Sir Alex Ferguson, the legendary former manager of Manchester United, was taken to hospital after feeling unwell at Old Trafford before the Premier League fixture against Liverpool. The 84-year-old wa...
